title: Auto ID column with a prefix across the board (does not change if we move it between different groups in the board)
excerpt: would it be possible to have a column where i can have a prefix, and then an auto generated number that sticks with the record for its lifespan.   the reason is to have this number as a reference number (CR#00).   I did …

posts.author: albukhari87 (Abdullah)
posts.cookedHtml: would it be possible to have a column where i can have a prefix, and then an auto generated number that sticks with the record for its lifespan. the reason is to have this number as a reference number (CR#00). I did check the auto numbering, but it changes when the record is moved.

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can use the AutoID app from the Marketplace https://monday.com/marketplace/17

Hope this helps
